transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/HVCNX1KUjHhVYVbYQhnsJ-xyn71-m8a1

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (93 mins - No highlights)

Deal Information

Prospect

Banks Ladd, owner of The Ladd Firm (estate planning and probate). Team includes:

Summer Palmer (operations/finance liaison)

Leo Baker (marketing lead/controller liaison)

Colin Bulger (external marketing contractor handling website, SEO, PPC, LSA; located in Mobile)

Recently hired probate attorney (joined Oct)

Revenue pace ~$800K this year; prior year ~$600K. Avg trust plan ~$4,000; pricing slightly below market.

Call Context

Follow-up to prior discussions and recent AI webinar. Prospect wants comprehensive growth plan, prioritizing AI, consistent lead flow, and strategic marketing without overburdening owner’s time.

Seats

AI Workforce Pro intended for firm team; specific seat count not stated.

Budget

Current ad spend ~$6,000/month split roughly between PPC and LSA.

Open to investing more if ROI is clear; acknowledges ability to afford more if volume works.

Current State

Channels: LSA, Google PPC, some social; website ~200 pages.

Internal/external resources: in-house marketing (Leo), external marketer (Colin) manages web/SEO/PPC/LSA; owner creates occasional content but time-constrained.

Tools: Paid ChatGPT and Claude accounts; using MyCase for case management.

Pain Points

Lead volume inconsistency; averaging ~5 design meetings/week vs goal of 10 (two/day).

Fragmented strategy across assets; strong creative but lacks cohesive, data-driven plan and testing rigor.

Time constraints for owner to create consistent video/content and implement optimization.

Difficulty interpreting data and executing A/B tests on landing pages.

Pricing slightly under market; leaving revenue on table.

Geographic footprint needs expansion (satellite offices) to drive Maps presence and local demand.

Specific Requirements

AI enablement:

14-day risk-free trial of AI Workforce Pro; interest in MyCase integration and prebuilt legal skills.

Education and guidance on automating intake/ops/drafting, with human-in-the-loop safeguards; potential Fractional CTO to build automations (estate planning/probate workflows).

Content at scale:

AI avatar for rapid video creation to feed organic and potentially ads.

Strategy and accountability:

Coaching to set goals, KPIs, and implement best practices; attend estate planning masterminds and workshops.

Marketing support:

Interest in full-service marketing but sensitive to overlapping with Colin; may start with coaching + AI and phase in FSM or a la carte.

Tech Stack

MyCase (case management)

ChatGPT (paid)

Claude (paid; Colin uses extensively)

CallRail previously mentioned for call tracking (historic)

QuickBooks (billing context mentioned)

Objections

Time to participate and implement: Banks fears overload. Addressed by proposing Elite Coach with manageable cadence (weekly large group + 1 monthly 1:1) and done-for-you components; AI implementation support via group sessions. Not fully overcome but mitigated.

Overlap with existing marketer (Colin): Concern about stepping on toes. Addressed with phased approach—start with AI + coaching; consider a la carte or full-service later.

Desire to “sleep on it” before signing: Banks won’t sign same day. Agreed to review and reconvene; no hard push.

Other Solutions Under Evaluation

None active named; previously worked with Empirical (churned ~1 year ago). Aware of competitor’s TikTok-driven presence.

Timeline

Immediate: Review and potentially sign AI Workforce Pro (14-day trial) + Elite Coach within days.

Follow-up meeting scheduled: Thursday, July 23, 4–5 pm Central, to finalize, answer questions, and discuss marketing scope.

Workshops: Scottsdale Sep 24–26 (Banks likely can attend); Marco Island Dec 3–5 as backup/next.

Decision Maker

Banks Ladd (owner/primary). For separate thread with Summer/Leo/Dana: Dana appears to be a departmental approver/controller for another account context in call; for Banks’s firm, Banks is DM.

Procurement Process

Banks reviews agreements, prefers not to sign on the spot; uses ACH for payments to avoid 3% card fee. Will coordinate internal team involvement as needed.

Next steps

Dan emailed two agreements:

AI Workforce Pro 14-day risk-free bundled at $1,597/month during trial (discounted from $2,497 when bundled).

Elite Coach at $2,600/month (discounted from $3,497) with Double Your Investment Guarantee.

Banks to review and possibly sign both; if signed before Dan’s return, SMB Team to onboard via team.

Reconvene July 23, 4 pm CT via Zoom to:

Answer any remaining questions on AI + coaching

Decide on marketing scope (full-service essentials at $3,497/month or a la carte)

Discuss satellite office rollout and review pricing strategy (consider fee increase toward market).

Q&A

Questions We Asked

Are you open to community/coaching with accountability and in-person workshops?

Banks is interested but worried about time; wants manageable cadence. Open to attend, especially estate planning mastermind; can’t do golf; likely can make Scottsdale, otherwise Marco Island.

Is your need more for us to take over web/SEO/ads or for AI solutions—or both?

Both. Has assets and decent ads but lacks cohesive strategy and execution rigor; wants comprehensive plan plus AI to scale content and automate workflows.

How are you currently using AI and what’s your stack?

Paid ChatGPT and Claude seats; dabbling. Colin uses Claude for copy, landing pages, creative. Using MyCase; eager for integration.

Current revenue and pricing?

On pace ~$800K this year; avg trust ~$4K (below market ~$5K). Open to raising fees.

Ad spend and performance?

~$6K/month split PPC/LSA. Colin reports ~10% ad cost to revenue last month (approx $60K revenue on $6K spend) across estate planning/probate.

Time concerns—will you be able to show up?

Banks will try; fears overload while needing ~5 hours/day for production. Wants delegation: hired probate attorney; in-house marketing help; external marketer.

Questions They Asked

How many coaching sessions and cadence?

Weekly large-group with Bill/Andy (Wed 2–3/3:30 CT), monthly 1:1 coach to start (can expand), monthly estate planning mastermind, quarterly in-person workshops.

Can Elite Coach include a guarantee?

Yes. Double Your Investment Guarantee: over 12 months, at minimum 2x total investment (fees plus ad spend managed by SMB) contingent on participation/compliance.

Pricing and starting terms for AI Workforce Pro and bundling?

Standalone $2,497/month; bundled with Elite Coach discounted to $1,597 with 14-day risk-free trial; weekly group implementation; MyCase integration imminent.

Full-Service Marketing pricing and scope?

FSM Essentials approx $3,497/month (starter tier); higher tiers available. Covers SEO, Maps, AEO, LSA/PPC/social, GBP posts, blogs to social, reviews tooling, avatar/social creative, emerging channels (ChatGPT ads, Reddit, CTV). Would overlap with Colin’s remit; can do a la carte to avoid conflicts.

Payment method and fees?

ACH preferred to avoid 3% card fee. ACH details to be entered on agreement; billing address confirmed (Truist Bank Building).

Action Items

Email billing team: apply $1k/mo credit for 3 mos; process net-increase bill - WATCH (5 secs)
Call Dana re: marketing agreement; get approval/signature - WATCH (5 secs)
Sign AI Workforce Pro 14-day trial + Elite Coach; complete ACH; text Dan; start trial - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend Zoom w/ Dan on Jul 23 4–5 pm CT re: AI/coaching/marketing - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Banks/Colin: marketing scope/pricing options for Jul 23 call - WATCH (5 secs)
